MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jun-06-2016 Continued To Jun-27-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: John O'Connor and Jeff Kirk of O'Connor & Associates telephone number 415-693-9960 for and with Plaintiff Jasmin Tang.

Ms. Tang explained why she is opposed to the withdrawal of Mr. O'Connor. The Court conferred with the parties in private to avoid prejudicing Ms. Tang's rights. PLAINTIFF JASMIN LI-TANG'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD is continued to June 27, 2016 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302. The Court on its own motion will also hear a motion to continue the trial date on June 27, 2016 in Dept. 302. Mr. O'Connor and Mr. Kirk need to file said motion by the end of the week.
